name: Neo-Brutalist Design System
description: Design System Neo-Brutalista para Laravel TALL Stack

black.description: Pure black for borders and shadows

primario.classes: btn-neo bg-neo-teal neo-border shadow-neo px-6 py-2 font-heading hover:bg-neo-yellow transition-colors duration-100

pilula.classes: btn-neo bg-neo-teal neo-border shadow-neo rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-heading hover:shadow-neo-lg transition-all duration-100

contorno.classes: btn-neo bg-white neo-border shadow-neo rounded-xl px-6 py-2 font-heading hover:bg-neo-yellow transition-colors duration-100

destrutivo.classes: btn-neo bg-neo-magenta neo-border shadow-neo px-6 py-2 font-heading -rotate-2 hover:rotate-0 transition-transform duration-100

texto.classes: underline underline-offset-2 font-heading font-bold px-4 py-2 hover:text-gray-600 transition-colors duration-100

default.classes: input-neo w-full neo-border shadow-neo px-3 py-2 outline-none font-body bg-white

error.classes: w-full border-4 border-red-500 bg-red-50 text-red-600 shadow-[4px_4px_0_#ef4444] px-3 py-2 outline-none font-body

sucesso.classes: bg-green-400 neo-border p-3 font-bold flex items-center gap-3 shadow-neo font-body feedback-banner

aviso.classes: bg-neo-yellow neo-border p-3 font-bold flex items-center gap-3 shadow-neo font-body feedback-banner

erro.classes: bg-neo-magenta neo-border p-3 font-bold flex items-center gap-3 shadow-neo font-body feedback-banner

info.classes: bg-neo-teal neo-border p-3 font-bold flex items-center gap-3 shadow-neo font-body feedback-banner
